records.question: Which customers have a billing address?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_addresses ON customers.customer_id = customer_addresses.customer_id
WHERE customer_addresses.address_type_code = 'Billing'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT customers.customer_id
FROM Customers AS customers
JOIN Customer_Addresses AS addresses ON customers.customer_id = addresses.customer_id
WHERE addresses.address_type_code = 'billing'

records.question: Which customers with the email rodriguez.nathanael@example.net and phone (773)971-9411x759 have used Credit Card as payment, placed UPS-shipped orders on or before 2008-10-23 06:42:10, lived at an address since 1975-12-24 10:01:37, and responded with an Order outcome?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_addresses ON customers.customer_id = customer_addresses.customer_id
JOIN customer_orders ON customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
JOIN mailshot_customers ON customers.customer_id = mailshot_customers.customer_id
WHERE customers.customer_email = 'rodriguez.nathanael@example.net' AND customer_orders.shipping_method_code = 'UPS' AND customers.payment_method = 'Credit Card' AND customer_addresses.date_address_from >= '1975-12-24 10:01:37' AND customer_orders.order_placed_datetime <= '2008-10-23 06:42:10' AND mailshot_customers.outcome_code = 'Order' AND customers.customer_phone = '(773)971-9411x759'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id
FROM Customers customers
JOIN Customer_Orders orders ON customers.customer_id = orders.customer_id
JOIN Customer_Addresses addresses ON customers.customer_id = addresses.customer_id
JOIN Mailshot_Customers mailshot ON customers.customer_id = mailshot.customer_id
WHERE customers.customer_email = 'rodriguez.nathanael@example.net'
AND customers.customer_phone = '(773)971-9411x759'
AND customers.payment_method = 'Credit Card'
AND orders.shipping_method_code = 'UPS'
AND orders.order_placed_datetime <= '2008-10-23 06:42:10'
AND addresses.date_address_from <= '1975-12-24 10:01:37'
AND mailshot.outcome_code IS NOT NULL

records.question: Who are the customers with payment method Direct Debit and phone number 1-878-600-7193x8180 who received a clothes campaign mailshot on 2018-03-15 15:43:14?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN mailshot_customers ON customers.customer_id = mailshot_customers.customer_id
JOIN mailshot_campaigns ON mailshot_customers.mailshot_id = mailshot_campaigns.mailshot_id
WHERE customers.payment_method = 'Direct Debit' AND customers.customer_phone = '1-878-600-7193x8180' AND mailshot_campaigns.product_category = 'clothes' AND mailshot_customers.mailshot_customer_date = '2018-03-15 15:43:14'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id 
FROM Customers 
JOIN Mailshot_Customers ON Customers.customer_id = Mailshot_Customers.customer_id 
JOIN Mailshot_Campaigns ON Mailshot_Customers.mailshot_id = Mailshot_Campaigns.mailshot_id 
WHERE Customers.payment_method = 'Direct Debit' 
AND Customers.customer_phone = '1-878-600-7193x8180' 
AND Mailshot_Customers.mailshot_customer_date = '2018-03-15 15:43:14' 
AND Mailshot_Campaigns.product_category = 'clothes'
